g.text: Drops duplicate webhook payloads by checking transient Redis msg_id keys
Throttles endpoint traffic based on client IPs to protect APIs
LAYER 3: ASYNC redis QUEUE (ARQ) & WORKER PIPELINE
Serializes background messages for heavy LLM processing
Handles intent classification, negotiation, and self-learning loops
LAYER 4: AI & BUSINESS LOGIC ORCHESTRATION ENGINES
Stores KB embeddings, chat logs, tickets, inventory, and order registers
Active chat session memory, locks, and global config reload pub/sub

svg.text: Dispatch HTTP Outbound Reply (Meta Graph API)
